inline_comments.message: Liam is there any way to avoid this "// @formatter".   Isn't it just an IDE thing, just for eclipse?   You may also get sonars for commented lines of code (not sure).

It turns off the formatter for this block of code because the formatter insisted on making the line longer that 120 characters by pulling the right hand side of the '=' up onto the previous line. I'll check if there's some setting in Eclipse that does this so that I don't have to turn off the formatter.

I wonder does this directive work in Intellij as well?
